title: One trigger may use auxdata belonging to another.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a String, b Int32, c Float64, d String);
CREATE TABLE x1(x Int32, y Int32, z Int32, w String);
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW tr1 TO x1 AS SELECT (if(position(a, 'abc') > 0, 1, 0)) AS x, (if(b = 'abc', 1, 0)) AS y, (if(c = 'abc', 1, 0)) AS z, d FROM t1;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW tr2 TO x1 AS SELECT (if(position(a, 'def') > 0, 1, 0)) AS x, (if(b = 'def', 1, 0)) AS y, (if(c = 'def', 1, 0)) AS z, NULL AS w FROM t1;
key_bug_features: REGEXP operators in triggers using incorrect auxdata
